description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Dinit on alpine-latest-aarch64 CI that triggers on push and pull requests to the master branch. The workflow uses a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, sets up an aarch64 Alpine Linux environment, installs necessary dependencies, configures and builds the project, and runs unit tests. The workflow also performs additional steps such as updating the package list, adding make, g++, and m4, and verifying the build with file and make check commands.
